chapter_title.en: The Exclusive Honors that Allah has Reserved for the Believers

text: 77 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: إن الله يذود المؤمن عما يكره كما يذود الرجل البعير الغريب، ليس من إبله (أهله - البحار).

en.muhajir-b-ali: 77. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Allah drives away a believer from what He dislikes just like a man who chases away a stray camel that does not belong to his flock.
